name: Fabi Table Lamp - 19 Inch Height - TBL4575 - Black/Natural - Safavieh
description:
Introducing the FABI TABLE LAMP, a fusion of contemporary design and natural aesthetic, perfect for illuminating any room. This statement piece features a stylish resin body with a striking natural finish that elegantly contrasts with the sleek black fabric shade, adding a touch of class to your space.

Dimensions:
- Total Height: 19 1/4" (48cm)
- Shade: 9" height x 3.75" top diameter (23cm x 9.5cm)
- Base: 14.5" height x 5.625" base diameter (37cm x 14cm)
- Cord Length: 60" (152cm)

The FABI TABLE LAMP is crafted to seamlessly blend with your existing d?cor. Its neutral color palette ensures compatibility with an array of design themes. Whether you're reading your favorite book, setting a mood for dinner, or creating a warm working environment, this lamp is designed to cater to your lighting needs.

Embrace sophistication and simplicity with this impeccably crafted lighting accessory. The FABI TABLE LAMP will be the centerpiece of your room, providing both functionality and decorative flair. Adjust your ambiance with this inviting and chic lighting source.
